0103_jump_forward.initialContent:
hero = "Kira"
hp = 100
mp = 40

def attack(target):
    dmg = roll(2, 8)
    target.hp -= dmg
    return dmg

def heal(ally):
    amt = roll(1, 6) + 5
    ally.hp += amt
    return amt

def flee():
    speed = roll(1, 20)
    return speed > 10

name = "Zara"
health = 100
attack = 25
defense = 18
speed = 12

def heal(amount):
    global health
    health += amount
    return health

def strike(target):
    damage = attack - 5
    target.health -= damage
    return damage
